category_sources: source_facts.description says LaTeXML is a LaTeX to XML/HTML/MathML converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official LaTeXML project site and uses the LaTeXML name.
docs_sources: Official LaTeXML site is source_facts.homepage; official GitHub README says the included manual is the documentation and identifies the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README says LaTeXML development is hosted on GitHub at brucemiller/LaTeXML.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LaTeX, XML, HTML, and MathML conversion functionality.
